subcodes.first_line: Your letter reached the Wronged One of the horizons in the Most Great Prison, and that which was inscribed therein became known [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب شما در سجن اعظم بنظر مظلوم آفاق رسید و آنچه در او مسطور معلوم گشت اینکه
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world
